scenarios.description: Overload parseInput(String, String) delegates to treeBuilder.parse with non-null html and baseUri
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = new Parser(fakeBuilder); fakeBuilder.parse returns a dummy Document instance; using real implementation for delegation
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the dummy Document instance returned by fakeBuilder.parse
pseudocode: TEST TC01_O1 parseInput String overload delegation
fakeBuilder.parse(new StringReader(html), baseUri, parser) returns dummyDoc;

scenarios.description: Overload parseInput(Reader, String) delegates to treeBuilder.parse with non-null Reader and baseUri
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = new Parser(fakeBuilder); fakeBuilder.parse returns a DocumentX; using StringReader stub as Reader
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the DocumentX instance returned by fakeBuilder.parse
pseudocode: TEST TC02_O2 parseInput Reader overload delegation

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) throws NullPointerException when html parameter is null
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()); using real builder implementation

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) throws NullPointerException when Reader is null
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); using real builder implementation
